text:
# portupgrade -f apache-2.2.15_2

--->  Reinstalling 'apache-2.2.15_2' (www/apache22)

  AUTH AUTHN AUTHZ CACHE DAV EXPERIMENTAL LDAP  MISC PROXY SSL SUEXEC THREADS
